SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTAGENA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAKNIN, SAGY DBA PROFESSIONAL GARAGE DOORS $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAN WEINGARTEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
